brand.name: Hot Beam Productions
brand.valueProposition: Technical production for live events where reliability is non-negotiable.

seo.defaultTitle: Hot Beam Productions | Colorado Live Event Production for Touring, Festivals & Venues
seo.description: Denver-based live event production for concerts, festivals, campus shows, and brand events. Lighting, lasers, LED video, and special effects delivered by one accountable crew.
keywords: denver concert lighting and laser production
festival and nightclub production boulder denver

hero.eyebrow: Denver Crew. National Execution. Show-Day Ready.
hero.departmentLine: Lighting · Lasers · LED Video · Special Effects
hero.description: From pre-production through strike, one team handles design, gear, crew, and live operation.
hero.headline: Live Event Production That Shows Up Ready.
hero.subheadline: Lighting, lasers, LED video, and SFX for touring artists, venues, festivals, and brand events.

services.label: Services
services.title: Built for Real-World Show Conditions

items.description: Lighting systems designed for live audiences and cameras.

items.title: Video

items.title: SFX

heading.label: Recent Work
heading.title: Shows We Have Built and Run
heading.subtitle: A selection of concert, campus, and special-event productions delivered by our team.

projects.title: OMNOM at A-Sig Indiana University
projects.description: Lighting and laser support for OMNOM at Indiana University, built for a packed student venue.
projects.longDescription: We designed and operated a combined lighting and laser package for OMNOM at A-Sig, syncing cues to set dynamics while staying within venue constraints and safety requirements.

projects.title: Odd Mob at The Fox
projects.description: Lighting and laser direction for Odd Mob at The Fox Theatre in Boulder.
projects.longDescription: Our team programmed and operated a club-forward visual system for Odd Mob, balancing high-impact beam looks with clean transitions and reliable execution all night.

projects.title: Proppa at SAE
projects.description: Visual production for Proppa at SAE Boulder with synchronized lighting and lasers.
projects.longDescription: We delivered a tightly timed lighting and laser show that emphasized key drops, maintained atmosphere between moments, and ran efficiently from load-in through strike.

projects.title: Gudfella at The Hanger
projects.description: Full visual support for Gudfella at The Hanger in New Orleans.
projects.longDescription: We built and ran a venue-specific lighting and laser package for Gudfella, optimizing placement, programming, and show flow for a high-energy room.

projects.title: Gudfella at Chi Psi
projects.description: Lighting and laser production for Gudfella at Chi Psi Boulder.
projects.longDescription: This fast-turn campus show required quick deployment and precise operation; we delivered synchronized looks that kept impact high without overbuilding the rig.

projects.title: Twin Diplomacy at ZBT
projects.description: Compact lighting and laser package for Twin Diplomacy at ZBT Boulder.
projects.longDescription: We engineered a high-output setup with a small footprint, focused on fast load-in, efficient cueing, and consistent visual coverage across the room.

projects.title: Laser Support for it’s murph at Mission Ballroom
projects.description: Laser system support and operation for it's murph at Mission Ballroom.
projects.longDescription: We integrated laser systems into the existing show infrastructure at Mission Ballroom and operated with strict variance-compliant procedures throughout the performance.

projects.title: Laser Support for BUNT at The Shrine
projects.description: Laser package deployment for BUNT at The Shrine in Los Angeles.
projects.longDescription: Our team coordinated with touring departments to deploy and operate lasers safely, delivering clean aerial looks that fit the artist's pacing and scene changes.

projects.title: Noizu at Phi Delt
projects.description: Lighting and laser production support for Noizu at Phi Delt Boulder.
projects.longDescription: We delivered a tight-footprint visual build for a high-density audience environment, with dynamic cue structure and reliable operation from open to close.

projects.title: Custom Timecoded Light Show for Private Client
projects.description: Custom timecoded lighting show for a private event in Crested Butte.
projects.longDescription: We designed and programmed a fully timecoded show tailored to the music and mountain setting, then executed onsite with detailed pre-production and safety planning.

projects.title: Charlie Wonder at Fox Boiler Room
projects.description: Lighting and laser execution for Charlie Wonder at the Fox Boiler Room.
projects.longDescription: We aligned cueing to the artist set and venue limitations, delivering fast deployment and polished visual moments throughout the event.

projects.title: Goodneighburs at Theta Chi
projects.description: Lighting and laser production for Goodneighburs at Theta Chi Boulder.
projects.longDescription: We produced a clean, artist-aligned visual program with efficient setup, strong beam architecture, and consistent show control from load-in through final cue.

heading.label: About Hot Beam
heading.title: Operators First. Production Partners Always.
heading.subtitle: We are a hands-on technical team trusted for complex shows where timing, safety, and execution matter.

story: Hot Beam was founded by working crew who wanted production partners to get clearer plans and fewer surprises.
The people who scope your show are the same people onsite calling cues and solving problems in real time.
We support promoters, agencies, venues, and tour teams with practical systems, disciplined communication, and reliable follow-through.

values.title: Technical Rigor
values.description: We prep thoroughly, model systems early, and document critical details before show day.

values.title: Single-Team Accountability
values.description: One team owns planning and execution, so decisions are faster and accountability is clear.

values.title: Creative Discipline
values.description: We design for the audience, the camera, and the run-of-show, not just for looks.

partners.name: Daniel Mankin
partners.bio: Daniel leads technical direction, laser safety, and control programming across touring and special events. He is FDA LSO certified.

partners.name: Beau
partners.bio: Beau leads logistics, staffing, and day-of operations, keeping schedules, vendors, and crews aligned from prep through strike.

closingCta.title: Need a Team That Can Carry the Whole Show?
closingCta.description: Send your date, venue, and goals. We will return a practical scope, staffing plan, and next steps.

heading.label: Inventory
heading.title: Rental Inventory
heading.subtitle: Show-ready gear available as dry hire or bundled with crew, transport, and operation.

rentals.footerNote: Need quantities, pricing, and package options? Request the latest inventory sheet.

items.name: 6.5 x 9.8ft Premium LED Video Wall System (2.8mm) with Novastar VX400
items.description: 24-panel 2.8mm LED wall package with Novastar VX400 processing for flicker-free camera and audience playback.
specs: Diode Type / Density: SMD1515 / 123,904 pixels per sqm
VX400 Data Outputs: 4x Gigabit Ethernet, 2x Fiber OPT

items.name: Able Archer 20W RGB Laser Projector (FB4 Integrated)
items.description: IP65 20W RGB laser projector with integrated FB4 for Art-Net and sACN control on large-format shows.
specs: Laser Diode Distribution: 6.4W Red, 6.4W Green, 8W Blue
Control Interfaces: FB4, Art-Net, Ethernet, DMX, ILDA

items.name: High-Power 10W RGB Laser Projector
items.description: 10W RGB laser projector for indoor venues and clubs, with ILDA and DMX control plus smooth color blending.
specs: Laser Diode Distribution: 3W Red, 3W Green, 4W Blue
Control Interfaces: ILDA, DMX512, Auto, Sound

items.name: Alpha Theta CDJ-3000x Professional DJ Multi Player
items.description: Flagship multi-player with fast track load, large touchscreen control, and pro networking for touring DJ booths.
specs: Connectivity: Gigabit PRO DJ LINK, Wi-Fi, USB-C

items.name: Pioneer DJ DJM-A9 4-Channel Professional Mixer
items.description: 4-channel club-standard mixer with high-resolution audio path, dual USB, and back-to-back ready workflow.

items.name: Artfox IPStrobe M Motorized Strobe & Wash (IP65)
items.description: IP65 motorized strobe and wash fixture built for outdoor stages, with bright white strobe and RGB background wash.
specs: Light Source Engine: 1176W White Strobe / 392W RGB
Color Generation: RGB Wash + Pure White Strobe
Control Protocols: Art-Net, sACN, DMX, RDM

items.name: Artfox Matrix Hybrid CMY 460 Moving Head
items.description: 460W hybrid moving head with CMY mixing, zoom, prisms, and gobo options for beam, spot, and wash looks.
specs: Light Source Engine: 460W Cool White LED (8000K)
Color Generation: CMY Mixing + Variable CTO/CTB

items.name: Artfox Solar 7 Moving Zoom Wash
items.description: Compact moving wash with 7x40W RGBW LEDs and fast zoom for punchy beams or wide stage coverage.
specs: Ingress Protection: IP20 / IP65 Variants Available

items.name: Cryogenic CO2 Cannon Jet (Includes 75lb Siphon Tank)
items.description: DMX-controlled CO2 jet package that delivers fast, high-impact plumes with an included 75lb siphon tank.
specs: Consumable Required: Liquid CO2 (75lb Siphon Tank)

items.name: Artfox 1500W Professional Hazer
items.description: Touring hazer with strong, even output for lighting and laser definition without heavy fog buildup.
specs: Output Volume: 38,000 cubic feet per minute
Consumable Required: Professional Haze Fluid (6L Tank)

items.name: 3m (9.84ft) F34 Aluminum Square Truss
items.description: 3m F34 square truss segment for main spans, grids, and structural runs.

items.name: 1.5m (4.92ft) F34 Aluminum Square Truss
items.description: 1.5m F34 square truss segment for modular builds, totems, and custom span lengths.

items.name: F34 6-Way Junction Corner Block
items.description: F34 six-way corner block for building multi-direction truss structures and 3D grids.

items.name: 3x3ft Heavy-Duty F34 Base Plate
items.description: Heavy-duty 3x3ft base plate for stabilizing larger freestanding truss totems.

items.name: 2x2ft F34 Base Plate
items.description: 2x2ft base plate for compact truss totems and lighter fixture loads.

items.name: 1x1ft F34 Top Plate
items.description: 1x1ft top plate for safely mounting fixtures on vertical F34 totems.

items.name: 24-inch Truss Arm Extension Pole (Boom Arm)
items.description: 24-inch truss boom arm for offset fixture mounting and improved focus angles.

items.name: Heavy-Duty Truss Lift / Crank Stand
items.description: Heavy-duty crank stand for safely raising loaded truss sections in indoor or outdoor setups.
specs: Safety: Automatic friction brake + lock pins

items.name: Artfox 4x4ft Modular Stage Deck (Adjustable Height)
items.description: 4x4ft modular stage deck with adjustable legs for level platforms on uneven surfaces.

items.name: Artfox Stage Deck Stairs (Adjustable)
items.description: Adjustable stair unit that locks into matching stage decks for safe performer access.

items.name: 400A Three-Phase Power Distribution Rack
items.description: 400A three-phase power distro rack for routing generator or tie-in feeds to stage circuits.

items.name: 50ft Socapex Extension Cable (19-Pin, 12 AWG)
items.description: 50ft 19-pin Socapex cable for carrying six circuits from distro to truss positions.
specs: Wire Gauge: 12 AWG copper, PVC jacket

items.name: Socapex Breakout Cable (19-Pin to 6x Edison)
items.description: 19-pin to Edison breakout tail for distributing six local circuits at the truss or stage edge.
